content:
# Solubility Test

**Summary**: A test to determine the amount of a substance that can dissolve in a solvent.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2017]] performed solubility tests to study the effect of particle size on barite removal.

- [[2017-jafarov|Jafarov, 2017]] performed solubility tests to check the effect of sodium silicate on barite (BaSO4) dissolution.

## Scientific Context



- [[2017-jafarov|Jafarov, 2017]] performed solubility tests to check the effect of sodium silicate on barite (BaSO4) dissolution.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Showed improved removal for micronized particles due to increased surface area. ([[2017-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2017, p. 14]])


- The test was used to determine if the addition of sodium silicate would stabilize the weight material. ([[2017-jafarov|Jafarov, 2017, p. 53]])
